build.//: iOS binaries are built on EAS's cloud macOS workers — there is no way to build/sign iOS on Linux. Android builds locally OR on EAS.

development.//: ios.simulator=false → a real-device build (your iPhone). EAS handles ad-hoc/development provisioning; a free Apple ID works (7-day signing). Register the device first with `eas device:create`.

development-simulator.//: For anyone with a Mac: an iOS Simulator dev-client build.

submit.//: No public store submission in v1 — internal/TestFlight/EAS-internal distribution only.
